dropzone.title: Drop your patent .docx here
dropzone.subtitle: or click to browse
dropzone.notice: Currently supports U.S. patent specifications (.docx) only.

restrictiveWording.verify: Restrictive wording found in specification paragraphs.
restrictiveWording.pass: No restrictive wording found in specification.

paragraphEnding.amend: Paragraphs with invalid or missing ending punctuation.
paragraphEnding.pass: All paragraphs have valid ending punctuation.

sequenceListing.amend: SEQ ID NO referenced but no sequence listing statement found.

priorArt.pass: No prior art citations found in background.

trackedChanges.amend: Document contains tracked changes (revisions). Accept or reject all changes before filing.

restrictiveWording.verify: Restrictive or indefinite wording found in claims.
restrictiveWording.pass: No restrictive or indefinite wording found in claims.

missingPeriod.pass: All claims end with a period.

extraPeriod.amend: Claims with extra or misplaced periods.
extraPeriod.pass: No extra periods found in claims.

restrictiveWording.verify: Restrictive or improper wording found in abstract.
restrictiveWording.pass: No restrictive or improper wording found in abstract.

structure.amend: Abstract has extra paragraphs or invalid ending.
structure.pass: Abstract is a single paragraph with valid ending.

impliedPhrases.pass: No implied phrases found in abstract.

wordCount.amend: Abstract word count is outside the 50–150 range.
wordCount.pass: Abstract word count is within the 50–150 range.

singleFigure.amend: Single-figure patent uses 'FIG. 1' instead of 'The Figure'.

priorArt.verify: Prior art references found in drawings description.
priorArt.pass: No prior art references in drawings description.

sequential.amend: Figures are not in sequential order.

loading.feature1_title: No Install. No Account. No Cloud.
loading.feature1_desc: Your confidential patent drafts never leave your device. Nothing is uploaded, and PatentLint doesn't even know who you are.
loading.feature2_desc: Catches restrictive wording, indefinite terms, antecedent basis gaps, means-plus-function issues, and more.
loading.feature3_desc: Interactive dependency tree and Mermaid diagram show your claim structure at a glance.
loading.feature4_desc: Mac, Windows, Linux, iPad — any device with a browser. No Word add-in required. Full UI in English, 繁體中文, 简体中文, and 日本語.
loading.feature5_desc: Drop a .docx file and get results in seconds. Download a PDF report — no cloud round-trip required.

checks.preamble_cross_category_mismatch: Cross-category preamble mismatch between dependent and independent claim.
checks.preamble_noun_mismatch: Preamble noun differs between dependent and independent claim.
checks.preamble_indefinite_article: Indefinite article in dependent claim preamble (should be 'The').
checks.spec_support_unsupported_terms: Claim terms not found in specification.
checks.spec_support_pass: All claim terms found in specification.
